name: Game Freak
description: Japanese developer best known as the primary developer of the mainline Pokémon RPG series.

eras.title: Pre-Pokémon Era
eras.description: Game Freak develops early titles such as Quinty / Mendel Palace before Pokémon defines the studio.

eras.title: Pokémon Handheld Era
eras.description: The studio establishes and expands Pokémon across Game Boy, Game Boy Advance, and Nintendo DS.

eras.title: 3D Pokémon Era
eras.description: Pokémon moves into full 3D and larger-scale releases across Nintendo 3DS and Switch.
